title: BlueMap Offline Player Markers (Forge/NeoForge)
description: A BlueMap addon for Forge and NeoForge that adds marker where players last disconnected
body:
# BlueMap Offline Player Markers (Forge)

Adds markers where players last logged off to [BlueMap](https://github.com/BlueMap-Minecraft/BlueMap).

| Closeup                                                                         | Faraway                                                                               | 
|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| ![closeup of the two offline player markers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TechnicJelle/BlueMapOfflinePlayerMarkers/main/.github/readme_assets/closeup.png) | ![far away shot of the two offline player markers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TechnicJelle/BlueMapOfflinePlayerMarkers/main/.github/readme_assets/faraway.png) |

The Original [Paper plugin](https://github.com/TechnicJelle/BlueMapOfflinePlayerMarkers) source code by [@TechnicJelle](https://github.com/TechnicJelle), Its [Fabric port](https://github.com/syorito-hatsuki/BlueMapOfflinePlayerMarkersFabric) source code by [@syorito-hatsuki](https://github.com/syorito-hatsuki).
Neither TechnicJelle nor syorito-hatsuki have any responsability to take concerning this mod or its code or its issues. So please do not report issues comming from my fork to their github/curseforge/modrinth pages.

## Fork Informations
### This fork includes:
- All the features of TechnicJelle's plugin (as of right now, v3.0) **(do tell me if I missed some features, old or new)**
### What has been added on top:
- **v1.4.1 (&& 1.3.2 if I decide to ever release it)**
  - ``/fakeOfflineMarker <name> [<pos>] [<uuid>]`` to create fake offline player markers
  - ``/deleteOfflineMarker <name>`` to delete a choosen marker
  - ``hideBannedPlayers`` and ``removeBannedPlayerMarkers``, unlike TechnicJelle's mod you can chose if you want to hide or delete the markers from banned players (or none of the above if both parameters are ``false``) **if put to delete, a server restart is advised**
  - ``advancedMode`` this parameter enables the ``deleteOfflineMarker`` command **server restart required**
- **v1.4.2**
  - ``hideHiddenPlayerMarkers`` that lets you configure if you want [hidden players](. " (spectator, vanish, invis potion, ...)") to have a offline marker created when they log out

## New naming convention:
- **1.3.X** (minor=3) refers to **java 17** (minecraft 1.18 to 1.20.4)
- **1.4.X** (minor=4) refers to **java 21** (minecraft 1.20.5 and up)
#### Small platform specific updates will now be under: ``1.major.minor.platform-specific``
- Each new version will have the content of the past ``minor`` version plus new content **(see above for fork contents)**

## Compatibility
The current mod requires [BlueMap](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bluemap) (and [KFF](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) for 1.20.4 and lower).\
Please refer to the version changelog of the file your are using as to which versions to choose from.

**If you are interested in what is planned for this fork, see my [Github TODO List](https://github.com/users/FLORIAN4600/projects/1/)**

### Current Compatibility:
#### Forge 1.18.2 -> 1.21.4
- **Bluemap** 3.12 -> 5.5 (or up)
- **Kotlin For Forge** 3.9.1 -> 5.9.0
#### NeoForge 1.20.2 -> 1.21+ (and 26+)
- **Bluemap** 3.12 -> 5.5 (or up)

## My special thanks to:
[syorito-hatsuki](https://github.com/syorito-hatsuki) and [@TechnicJelle](https://github.com/TechnicJelle) for providing their source code, as without them I would not have been able to port the mod from [syorito-hatsuki's fabric version](https://modrinth.com/mod/bluemap-offline-player-markers-(fabric)) to Forge and NeoForge
